title: Stir-Fried Cranberry Chicken
description: A sweet and savory stir-fry dish made with chicken, cranberries, and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the smoked paprika, roasted garlic, and thyme to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cranberries and stir-fry sauce to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the cranberry mixture.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the cranberry sauce.
